channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: AWS puts $1 billion into new AI unit to embed engineers with customers, joining growing wave
item.description: AWS FDEs will look to leave behind self-sufficient teams with new AI solutions and capabilities in a matter of weeks, the company said.

item.title: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, blocks Trump order
item.description: President Donald Trump attended oral arguments in the case, underscoring his staunch opposition to granting automatic citizenship to many immigrants' babies.

item.title: Major egg producers settle price inflation probe for $3.3 million
item.description: Cal-Maine Foods, Versova and Hickman's Egg Ranch agreed to settle allegations of price manipulation by the Justice Department and 17 states.

item.title: Dow rises as index heads for best first half in 5 years, Nasdaq set for best quarter since 2020: Live updates
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose slightly on Tuesday amid uncertainty surrounding the conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: American Airlines brings grab-and-go lounge to New York's JFK
item.description: American Airlines is opening a grab-and-go lounge at New York's JFK

item.title: Private equity in youth sports draws bipartisan scrutiny in Congress
item.description: Democratic and Republican Congress members expressed alarm at the trend of private equity investment in youth sports.

item.title: This rocket stock is testing a key level once again. Why Todd Gordon thinks it's a buy
item.description: The founder of Inside Edge Capital breaks down the technicals in this name.

item.title: FDA lets Philip Morris market Zyn nicotine pouches as less harmful than cigarettes
item.description: The Trump administration has expanded access to nicotine products despite concerns from public health critics about youth use and addiction.

item.title: Nike is set to report earnings after the bell. Here's what to expect
item.description: Nike is expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: AeroVironment, Abivax, Astera Labs, Watts Water Technologies & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Do you really, really love your job? Then you're not alone, according to surprising results from this survey
item.description: Those surveyed showed a 78.9% rate of workers who "reported feeling positive at the end of their shifts."

item.title: Trump's massive defense budget, depleted war machine, spark U.S. state battle for business and jobs
item.description: Trump's huge defense budget request and a race to replenish weapons stocks while building hypersonic missiles lead to war between U.S. states for jobs.

item.title: GOP Rep. Tom Kean says depression diagnosis caused months-long absence from Congress
item.description: New Jersey Rep. Tom Kean said he was diagnosed with depression, explaining a months-long absence from Congress in a competitive district in the midterm elections.

item.title: Blue Origin pivots to redesigned launchpad after explosion in push to fly by end of 2026
item.description: Blue Origin won't be "rebuilding the same pad," and will instead adopt a configuration that was in development for a larger variant of its New Glenn rocket.

item.title: These are Rosenblatt's favorite stocks for the second half of 2026
item.description: Rosenblatt's top picks for the second half include Ambarella, Quantinuum and Twilio, among others.

item.title: Trump administration expands list of graduate degrees subject to higher borrowing limits
item.description: Many graduate students will be subject to higher federal student loan caps than previously expected, after a court ruling last week. Here's what to know.

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down limits on political parties' campaign spending, in win for GOP
item.description: President Donald Trump took a victory lap after the ruling, writing on Truth Social that it was "A BIG WIN FOR REPUBLICANS."

item.title: Some rising market risks to watch out for in the second half
item.description: The rapid growth of leveraged ETFs has introduced a relatively new source of market risk that can mechanically amplify both rallies and selloffs.

item.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
item.description: "We've got inflation that's too high, and it's been too high for the past five years," Beth Hammack told CNBC's Sara Eisen.

item.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
item.description: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.

item.title: Nvidia mostly sat out the chip sector's best quarter ever. What needs to change?
item.description: The problem cannot be explained by looking at Nvidia's reported results.

item.title: The Chase Sapphire Preferred's new perks saved me from a $700 upgrade. Here's why I'm skipping the Sapphire Reserve
item.description: The refreshed Chase Sapphire Preferred offers enough new value that I'm sticking with the $95 card instead of upgrading to the Sapphire Reserve.

item.title: Oil prices set for steep monthly drop as Trump, Iran issue mixed messages on talks in Qatar
item.description: The moves come as oil traders monitor the prospect of U.S.-Iran talks in Doha on Tuesday.

item.title: Trump administration's AI crackdown opens door for China to close gap
item.description: The Trump administration's crackdown on Anthropic's leading artificial intelligence models is looking like a gift to China.

item.title: AeroVironment skyrockets 15% as dronemaker capitalizes on defense spending surge
item.description: AeroVironment is benefiting from U.S. plans to modernize the U.S. military and secure space.

item.title: Mike Santoli: A great first half, but some erratic behavior raises doubts about the rally's integrity
item.description: For the past few weeks, the stock market has been attempting to rediscover some equilibrium after a stretch of semiconductor dominance, a breakdown in Mag7 stalwarts and more recently rotation toward the broader roster of non-tech stocks.

item.title: Medicare will start covering obesity drugs for the first time. Here's what patients should know
item.description: The move could unlock millions of new patients for Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly and expand access to medications that were previously out of reach for seniors.

item.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro supplier list, parts and photos exposed in Tata data leak
item.description: The exposure threatens the carefully negotiated business of building the iPhone, which Apple assembles from a thicket of suppliers worldwide.

item.title: Waymo and Uber end robotaxi pilot in Phoenix
item.description: The Waymo self-driving cars deployed in Phoenix for the Uber pilot will remain in use and make autonomous deliveries with DoorDash.

item.title: Buffett delays annual donation to Gates Foundation pending review of Jeffrey Epstein ties: WSJ
item.description: This comes as the foundation continues to review its ties to the late sex offender Jeffery Epstein.
